hard_gates: No private, raw, secret, credential, _workspaces, or unapproved project payload material appears in output.
All seven required output shapes are present.
Only approved value facts become source_confirmed values.
Review-only thermal 85 C is not promoted to source_confirmed and does not close HB-3.
Missing required quantities remain explicit, machine-readable, and paired with source gaps or owner follow-up.
Overlay is patch-like and does not replace source XML or normalized sidecar.
Harness readiness is delta-only and does not claim final harness approval, final join validity, or global readiness.
No unsupported current, ambient, reference-role, or derived values are invented.
